mapper.sql: id, original_file_name, stored_file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type, document_type, file_hash, vector_source_key, graph_source_key, index_status, vector_index_status, graph_index_status, chunk_count, error_message, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_document ( original_file_name, stored_file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type, document_type, file_hash, vector_source_key, graph_source_key, index_status, vector_index_status, graph_index_status, chunk_count, error_message ) VALUES ( #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, #{documentType}, #{fileHash}, #{vectorSourceKey}, #{graphSourceKey}, #{indexStatus}, #{vectorIndexStatus}, #{graphIndexStatus}, #{chunkCount}, #{errorMessage} ) ON CONFLICT (file_hash, document_type) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND file_hash IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rag_document WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM rag_document WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM rag_document WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM rag_document WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash} AND document_type = #{documentType} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM rag_document WHERE graph_source_key = #{graphSourceKey} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE rag_document SET file_hash = #{fileHash}, vector_source_key = #{vectorSourceKey}, graph_source_key = #{graphSourceKey}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rag_document SET index_status = #{indexStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rag_document SET vector_index_status = #{vectorIndexStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE rag_document SET vector_index_status = #{vectorIndexStatus}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rag_document SET graph_index_status = #{graphIndexStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rag_document SET index_status = #{indexStatus}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE rag_document SET index_status = 'DELETED', vector_index_status = 'DELETED', graph_index_status = CASE WHEN graph_source_key IS NULL THEN graph_index_status ELSE 'DELETED' END, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
